steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $x+40=95$. To isolate $x$, use the inverse operation: subtract $40$ from both sides. This gives $x=95-40$.

steps.title: Compute and check
steps.content: Finish the subtraction: $95-40=55$, so $x=55$. Checking in the original equation gives $55+40=95$, which satisfies the equation. The answer is 55.
